title: scutia myrtina var. oblongifolia
intro: Scutia myrtina var. oblongifolia, a lesser-known variety of the Scutia myrtina plant, is a shrub or small tree native to tropical forests in the Western Ghats of India. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Scutia myrtina var. oblongifolia can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
